name: research-paper-workflow
description: End-to-end research paper workflow for CS, AI, AI4Science papers — from idea to submission.

interface.shortDescription: End-to-end CS/AI research paper workflow from idea to submission.
interface.longDescription: A 16-skill family (rpw-*) for CS, AI, and AI4Science paper projects. Each skill loads independently: rpw-pipeline, rpw-idea-optimize, rpw-idea-review, rpw-literature-monitor, rpw-literature-search, rpw-claim-manifest, rpw-experiment-design, rpw-experiment-implementation, rpw-result-engineering, rpw-result-analysis, rpw-paper-writer, rpw-paper-reviewer, rpw-integrity-audit, rpw-submission-check, rpw-rebuttal, and rpw-common (shared governance). Includes triple-check source verification, next-step navigation, Python utility scripts, and reusable templates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use research-paper-workflow to manage this paper project. Respect mode boundaries, source verification requirements, and next-step menu gates.
